project.name: Knowledge Hub
project.description: Internal memory and handoff service for AI-assisted work sessions.
project.current_goal: Move from internal alpha toward calmer production deploy readiness with strong automation.
project.rules: Prefer automation over manual entry. Keep the system simple, reliable, and ready for future multi-user growth.

session_logs.task: Strengthen production baseline and dogfood the service itself
session_logs.summary: Added watcher automation, backups, scheduler helpers, handoff pages, and started preparing a calmer Render deployment path.
actions_taken: Added inbox watcher status and Task Scheduler helpers
Added backup archive creation and daily backup task helpers
session_logs.next_step: Finish Render-ready production baseline and then plan the first multi-user SaaS slice.

prompt_templates.title: Continue Knowledge Hub work
prompt_templates.content: Read the ready-for-next-chat handoff first, do not ask to restate context, and focus on the next production-safe improvement.

snapshots.title: Current internal state
snapshots.content: Knowledge Hub now has project packages, automation events, inbox watcher status, backup archives, and copy-friendly handoff pages.
